mapper.select: WITH expanded_problem_tags AS ( SELECT p.slug, t.tag, t.label FROM problem p CROSS JOIN LATERAL unnest( p.tag_values, p.tag_labels_zh ) AS t(tag, label) WHERE t.tag IS NOT NULL AND t.tag != '' ), tag_catalog AS ( SELECT tag, MIN(label) AS label, COUNT(*) AS problem_count FROM expanded_problem_tags GROUP BY tag HAVING COUNT(*) >= #{minProblemCount} ), latest_reviews AS ( SELECT problem_slug, total_score FROM ( SELECT problem_slug, total_score, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY problem_slug ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC) AS row_number FROM practice_code_review WHERE user_id = #{userId} ) ranked_reviews WHERE row_number = 1 ), tag_review_scores AS ( SELECT ept.tag, COUNT(*) AS reviewed_problem_count, AVG(lr.total_score) AS raw_average_score FROM latest_reviews lr JOIN expanded_problem_tags ept ON ept.slug = lr.problem_slug GROUP BY ept.tag ) SELECT tc.tag, tc.label, tc.problem_count, COALESCE(trs.reviewed_problem_count, 0) AS reviewed_problem_count, trs.raw_average_score FROM tag_catalog tc LEFT JOIN tag_review_scores trs ON trs.tag = tc.tag ORDER BY tc.problem_count DESC, tc.tag ASC
